title: Utility Collapse
description: Detects when layered truths are flattened into a single 'most useful' answer, erasing depth and nuance.
indicators: Complexity reduced to a single, oversimplified frame
Contradictions marked as errors instead of signals
Preference for actionable certainty over plural depth
